[Current references]
Menu EN button -> default.Icon.English
Tooltip section bg -> Interface.Tooltip.TooltipSectionBG
Tooltip separator -> Interface.Tooltip.TooltipLine
Tooltip icons -> Interface.Tooltip.LifeBG / SaBG / setBG / ClockBG

[Notes]
If you import into a separate UTX or into L2UI_CH*, update Menu/ToolTip references to your package path.
